# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-, Format Version'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for cross-account CI/CD access with organization-wide trust policy

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx)
    AllowedPattern: 'o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID

  TrustedAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: List of specific trusted AWS account IDs for CI/CD access
    Default: ''

  RoleName:
    Type: String
    Default: CrossAccountCICDRole
    Description: Name of the IAM role

  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for additional security when assuming the role
    MinLength: 10
    NoEcho: true

  MaxSessionDurationSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 7200
    Description: Maximum session duration in seconds

Conditions:
  HasSpecificAccounts: !Not
    - !Equals
      - !Join ['', !Ref TrustedAccountIds]
      - ''

Resources:
  CrossAccountCICDRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDurationSeconds
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowOrganizationAssumeRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: '*'
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:PrincipalOrgID: !Ref OrganizationId
              StringLike:
                aws:PrincipalArn:
                  - 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/cicd-*'
                  - 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/github-actions-*'
                  - 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/jenkins-*'
              StringEquals:
                sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
          - !If
            - HasSpecificAccounts
            - Sid: AllowSpecificAccountsAssumeRole
              Effect: Allow
              Principal:
                AWS: !Split
                  - ','
                  - !Sub
                    - '${accounts}'
                    - accounts: !Join
                        - ','
                        - !Ref TrustedAccountIds
              Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
              Condition:
                StringEquals:
                  sts:ExternalId: !Ref ExternalId
                Bool:
                  aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'false'
                StringLike:
                  aws:PrincipalArn:
                    - 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/cicd-*'
                    - 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/github-actions-*'
                    - 'arn:aws:iam::*:role/jenkins-*'
            - !Ref AWS::NoValue
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CICDDeploymentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: CloudFormationAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DeleteStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackEvents'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStackResources'
                  - 'cloudformation:GetTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:ValidateTemplate'
                  - 'cloudformation:ListStacks'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    aws:RequestedRegion:
                      - us-east-1
                      - us-west-2
                      - eu-west-1
              - Sid: S3ArtifactAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                  - 's3:GetBucketLocation'
                Resource:
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::*-cicd-artifacts-*'
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::*-cicd-artifacts-*/*'
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::*-deployment-*'
                  - 'arn:aws:s3:::*-deployment-*/*'
              - Sid: ECRAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
                  - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
                  - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
                  - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
                  - 'ecr:PutImage'
                  - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
                  - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:DescribeRepositories'
                  - 'ecr:ListImages'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: ECSDeployAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecs:UpdateService'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeServices'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeTaskDefinition'
                  - 'ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition'
                  - 'ecs:DeregisterTaskDefinition'
                  - 'ecs:ListTasks'
                  - 'ecs:DescribeTasks'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: LambdaDeployAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionCode'
                  - 'lambda:UpdateFunctionConfiguration'
                  - 'lambda:GetFunction'
                  - 'lambda:ListFunctions'
                  - 'lambda:PublishVersion'
                  - 'lambda:UpdateAlias'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: IAMPassRole
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'iam:PassRole'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  StringEquals:
                    iam:PassedToService:
                      - 'ecs-tasks.amazonaws.com'
                      - 'lambda.amazonaws.com'
                      - 'cloudformation.amazonaws.com'
              - Sid: DenyPrivilegeEscalation
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateUser'
                  - 'iam:CreateRole'
                  - 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:AttachUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutUserPolicy'
                  - 'iam:CreateAccessKey'
                  - 'iam:CreateLoginProfile'
                  - 'iam:UpdateAssumeRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:AddUserToGroup'
                  - 'organizations:*'
                Resource: '*'
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: cicd
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CrossAccountCICD

  RoleActivityAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: !Sub '${RoleName}-UnusualActivity'
      AlarmDescription: Alert on unusual assume role activity for CI/CD cross-account role
      Namespace: AWS/CloudTrail
      MetricName: AssumeRoleEvents
      Dimensions:
        - Name: RoleName
          Value: !Ref RoleName
      Statistic: Sum
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: 50
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      TreatMissingData: notBreaching

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the cross-account CI/CD role
    Value: !GetAtt CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-RoleArn'

  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the cross-account CI/CD role
    Value: !Ref CrossAccountCICDRole

  AssumeRoleCommand:
    Description: AWS CLI command to assume this role
    Value: !Sub >-
      aws sts assume-role
      --role-arn ${CrossAccountCICDRole.Arn}
      --role-session-name cicd-session
      --external-id <EXTERNAL_ID>
